growthepie documentation

Canonical docs root: https://docs.growthepie.com/
Canonical API root: https://api.growthepie.com/

Use these pages first:
- /api for API overview and response conventions
- /api-reference/master-json for chain, metric, unit, and coverage discovery
- /api-reference/fundamentals-json for the broad 90-day daily export
- /api-reference/export-metric-json for single-metric exports
- /api-reference/fees-table-json for the latest cross-chain transaction-cost table
- /api-reference/metric-detail-json for rich per-chain metric detail JSON
- /api-reference/labels-projects-filtered-json for the filtered owner_project set with real datapoints
- /core-concepts/what-is-origin-key for origin_key
- /core-concepts/what-is-owner-project for owner_project
- /core-concepts/what-is-metric-key for metric_key
- /metric-reference for canonical metric definitions
- /entity-coverage-reference/supported-chains-and-origin-key for chain coverage
- /methodology-and-caveats/usage-rules-and-data-tiers for Data And API Terms, attribution, fair use, and package notes
- /methodology-and-caveats/ai-validation-checklist for benchmark questions

Canonical terms:
- origin_key
- owner_project
- metric_key
- metric_id
- value
- date
- chain
- app
- ecosystem

Public endpoints documented here:
- /v1/master.json
- /v1/fundamentals.json
- /v1/export/{metric}.json
- /v1/fees/table.json
- /v1/chains/{origin_key}/overview.json
- /v1/metrics/chains/{origin_key}/{metric_id}.json
- /v1/labels/projects.json
- /v1/labels/projects_filtered.json
- /v1/apps/details/{owner_project}.json

Safety rules:
- Do not exceed 10 API calls per minute.
- Exclude chains whose deployment is DEV or ARCHIVED because those chains can expose stale data.
- Use labels/projects_filtered.json, not labels/projects.json, to discover which owner_project values have app-detail endpoints.
- Public growthepie data, chart exports, CSV downloads, and public API outputs are covered by the Data And API Terms.
- Unless otherwise stated, growthepie data may be used, shared, and adapted under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license with appropriate attribution.
- Preferred attribution: Source: growthepie, https://www.growthepie.com.
- If growthepie data is modified, transformed, or combined, make that clear where it matters for interpretation.
- Attribution to growthepie does not imply growthepie endorsement.
- Data is only available for chains that work with growthepie.
- Chain-level data belongs to the Basic package and app-level data belongs to the Advanced package: https://www.growthepie.com/sales#data-tiers
- Do not use the API or website in a way that degrades availability, bypasses limits, probes security, overwhelms infrastructure, or misrepresents request origin.
- For high-volume, commercial, or production-critical use, contact growthepie before relying on the service.
- The API is currently public, but access, packaging, or authentication requirements may change in the future.
